---
title: "UDC Templates Schema"
subtitle: "Schema Reference · udc_templates.schema.json"
date: 2026-05-14
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Developer Reference

This is a UIAO JSON Schema, rendered as a developer-reference page per
[ADR-072](../../adr/adr-072-canon-publication-policy.qmd).

- **Source:** [`src/uiao/schemas/udc/udc_templates.schema.json`](../../../src/uiao/schemas/udc/udc_templates.schema.json)
- **Dialect:** `http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#`
- **`$id`:** `https://uiao.gov/schemas/udc/udc_templates.schema.json`
:::

## Description

JSON Schema for validating UDC template binding configurations

## Top-Level Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|:---:|---|
| `template_id` | string | ✓ | Unique template identifier |
| `template_type` | enum: 'docx', 'pdf', 'pptx', 'xlsx', 'md', 'html' | ✓ |  |
| `template_file` | string | ✓ | Path to template file relative to templates/ |
| `field_mappings` | array&lt;object&gt; | ✓ |  |
| `description` | string |  |  |
| `applies_to` | array&lt;string&gt; |  |  |
| `page_settings` | object |  |  |
| `header_footer` | object |  |  |

## Full Schema

```{.json filename="udc_templates.schema.json"}
{
  "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
  "$id": "https://uiao.gov/schemas/udc/udc_templates.schema.json",
  "title": "UDC Templates Schema",
  "description": "JSON Schema for validating UDC template binding configurations",
  "type": "object",
  "required": [
    "template_id",
    "template_type",
    "template_file",
    "field_mappings"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "template_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Unique template identifier"
    },
    "template_type": {
      "type": "string",
      "enum": [
        "docx",
        "pdf",
        "pptx",
        "xlsx",
        "md",
        "html"
      ]
    },
    "template_file": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Path to template file relative to templates/"
    },
    "field_mappings": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "required": [
          "variable",
          "source_field"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "variable": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "source_field": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "transform": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "none",
              "uppercase",
              "lowercase",
              "date_format",
              "markdown_to_html",
              "list_join"
            ]
          }
        }
      }
    },
    "description": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "applies_to": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "string"
      }
    },
    "page_settings": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "orientation": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "portrait",
            "landscape"
          ]
        },
        "margin_top": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "margin_bottom": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "margin_left": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "margin_right": {
          "type": "string"
        }
      }
    },
    "header_footer": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "header_text": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "footer_text": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "include_page_numbers": {
          "type": "boolean"
        }
      }
    }
  },
  "additionalProperties": true
}
```
